title: From Transcription to Live Music: Gemini's Audio Stack — Thor Schaeff, Google DeepMind
summary: Gemini 3 Flash Preview provides one-call audio understanding including speaker identification by name, timestamps, emotion detection, language identification with translation, and summarization. It forms the foundation for an audio stack that supports downstream speech generation and real-time multimodal processing.
writeup: Thor Schaeff of Google DeepMind walks through Gemini's audio stack, centered on Gemini 3 Flash Preview and its one-call audio understanding. A single request handles speaker identification by name, timestamps, emotion detection, language identification with translation, and summarization. These capabilities form the foundation for downstream speech generation and real-time multimodal processing, consolidating tasks that often require separate models into one interface.
